title: Stool Pigeon
writer: Stuart Anthony, Mort Blumenstock, Edward J. Meagher
actors: Olive Borden, Charles Delaney, Lucy Beaumont
plot: An underworld story about a boy (Charles Delaney) suspected of being a stool pigeon but in reality he is only stealing to give his mother a better life. His devoted girlfriend Goldie (Olive Borden) tries to help him turn his life ...
